name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inconsistent cash position reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate daily cash position reports instead of manual cash position reports.
problem_solved: Inconsistent cash position reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
